final_answer:
Fresh live-at-proposal-start is valid; the only thing I said is invalid is continuously live recalculation while the vote is open.

Why this matters: if denominator/eligibility changes mid-vote, the same votes can flip pass/fail, which makes validator admission non-deterministic and gameable.

What should be done next:
1. Lock wording: “live snapshot at proposal start (finalized height H)” is the required model.
2. Keep that snapshot fixed for that nonce only.
3. Start a new nonce with a new live snapshot if you want updated validator state.
